modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble updating Windows 10 via Software Center

full_description_text:  
I'm trying to update my Windows 10 through the Software Center, but it's just not working. I keep clicking on the update option, and nothing seems to happen. It's kinda frustrating because I thought it would be a simple process. Any idea why this might be happening?
short_description: Trouble updating Windows 10 via Software Center
description: I'm trying to update my Windows 10 through the Software Center, but it's just not working. I keep clicking on the update option, and nothing seems to happen. It's kinda frustrating because I thought it would be a simple process. Any idea why this might be happening?
